inputDescription: Enter a single IPv4 address, IPv6 address, or CIDR block to normalize it into canonical network notation.
resultDescription: Canonical address or network range. CIDR input is rewritten to the network address with host bits cleared.
label: IP or CIDR
invalidInput: Invalid IP address or CIDR block
invalidInputDescription: Use a valid IPv4 address, IPv6 address, or CIDR range. Prefix lengths must match the address family.
